name: Cream of Coquilles St. Jacques with Leeks
recipeIngredient: 2 large Leeks; white parts only, cut into 1-1/2 inch julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash leeks thoroughly; do not dry.
2. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over low heat.
3. Add leeks and cover; let sweat until tender and translucent, stirring occasionally for about 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Add Fish Fumet and sherry to the skillet; heat just until the liquid trembles.
5. Add scallops and poach for 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, remove scallops and keep warm.
6. Increase heat and boil the liquid until it reduces by half, scraping up any bits clinging to the bottom of the pan.
7. Add cream; continue boiling until thickened.
8. Return leeks to the skillet and heat through.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Divide leeks and sauce among 4 heated serving plates and arrange scallops on top. Serve immediately.
